internet_radio_desc: Stream your favorite radio stations from the web.
ui_no_items_available_in_language: No items available in this language
ui_press_esc_to_return: Press Esc to return to menu...
ui_speech_engine_updated: Speech engine updated with the selected voice.
ui_reader_highlight_help: The highlighted word represents the token currently being spoken.
ui_reader_export_help: Use Ctrl+E to export the current document to a WAV file.
ui_reader_play_help: Use Ctrl+P for continuous playback or Ctrl+L for line-by-line playback with live highlighting.
ui_reader_playing_status: Playing. Press Ctrl+P to pause after the current word.
ui_reader_line_playing_status: Line mode. Press a key to stop playback, then Space to continue to the next line.
ui_reader_line_wait_status: Line complete. Press Space to play the next line.
ui_reader_speech_off: Speech mode is off. Turn speech on to use Ctrl+P playback.
ui_reader_playback_failed: Unable to play buffered speech for this word.
voip_error_client_missing: linphonecsh is not installed on this system.
voip_error_prepare: Unable to prepare the VoIP command.
voip_error_register: Unable to register the VoIP account.
voip_error_status: Unable to read the VoIP registration status.
voip_error_contact_target: The selected contact does not have a valid SIP address or number.
voip_prompt_target: Enter SIP address, extension, or number
voip_call_failed: Unable to start a call to %s.
voip_hangup_failed: Unable to end the VoIP call.
voip_no_contacts: No contacts are available for VoIP dialing.
ui_footer_menu_info: [Arrows: Navigate | Enter: Select | Esc: Back/Exit | Ctrl+I: Info]
ui_footer_search: [Arrows: Navigate | Enter: Select | Esc: Cancel | Type to Search]
ui_footer_accessible_text: [Up/Down: Read Line | Enter: Repeat | Esc: Back]
ui_footer_spoken_text: [Space: Pause/Resume | Up: Previous | Down: Next | Enter: Repeat | Esc: Back]
ui_footer_word_reader: [Up: Previous | Down: Next | Enter: Next | Ctrl+E: Export to wave | Ctrl+P: Play | Ctrl+L: Line Play | Esc: Back]
ui_footer_open_back: [Arrows: Navigate | Enter: Open voice actions | Esc: Back]
ui_footer_voice_busy: [Arrows: Navigate locally | Enter: Disabled | Esc: Disabled]
ui_footer_alarm_shortcuts: [Arrows: Navigate | Enter: Select | Shortcuts: a, u, r | Esc: Back]
ui_footer_radio: [Enter: Play/Pause | N: Next | P: Previous | R: Refresh | Esc: Stop & Back]
music_footer: [A,S,D,F,G,H,J,K,L,;,': White | W,E,T,Y,U,O,P: Black | Z/X: Octave | C: Reset | Enter: Repeat | Esc: Back]
music_screen_intro: Use a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white keys on A S D F G H J K L ; ' and black keys on W E T Y U O P.
music_screen_hint: Use Z for lower octave, X for higher octave, and C to return to the default octave.
music_screen_white_keys: White keys: A S D F G H J K L ; '
music_screen_black_keys: Black keys: W E T Y U O P
music_screen_instruments_hint: Press Esc to return. Press Enter to hear the instrument name again.
music_status_keep_playing: Use the piano keyboard layout to play %s.
ui_press_any_key_to_go_back: Press any key to go back...
ui_press_any_key_to_start_over: Press any key to start over...
ui_no_results_found_press_any_key: No results found. Press any key...
ui_no_events_found_press_any_key: No events found. Press any key...
ui_transfer_lock_message: The current menu remains active until the transfer finishes.
ui_dictionary_file_missing_format: Dictionary file '%s' not found. Press any key...
ui_end_of_poem_go_back: End of Poem. Press any key to go back...
ui_typing_welcome: Build speed, confidence, and consistency one session at a time.
ui_typing_practice_help: [Type directly | Enter: Submit | Backspace: Edit | Tab: Repeat prompt | Esc: Cancel]
ui_typing_keep_going: Keep going. Every session makes you stronger.
ui_typing_finish_session_for_rank: Finish a typing session to compare yourself on the leaderboard.
ui_typing_no_badges_yet: No badges yet. Finish a session to start collecting them.
ui_typing_nothing_to_share: No completed typing session is available to share yet.
ui_typing_share_saved: A shareable summary was saved to
ui_badge_streak_3_desc: Completed three strong sessions in a row.
ui_press_enter_change_or_esc_back: Press Enter to change or Esc to go back
ui_server_sync_failed_upload: Server sync failed (Upload). Local changes saved
fm_word_viewer_desc: View text files word by word, ready for TTS.
notepad_search_desc: Search note files and open a matching result.
learn_desc: Learning games and guided activities that build confidence and independence.
learn_typing_desc: Speech-guided typing practice with badges, progress tracking, and leaderboards.
voip_desc: Configure a SIP account and place accessible VoIP calls from Sai.
voip_dial_desc: Dial a SIP URI, extension, or number using the configured VoIP account.
voip_call_contact_desc: Place a VoIP call using the selected contact's phone field.
voip_status_desc: Check SIP registration status through the configured VoIP client.
voip_show_config_desc: Review the saved VoIP account configuration.
voip_display_name_desc: Set the caller display name used for the VoIP account.
voip_sip_server_desc: Set the SIP proxy or registrar server.
voip_sip_domain_desc: Set the SIP domain used for building dial targets.
voip_username_desc: Set the SIP username or extension.
mp3_player_desc: Browse and play MP3 files stored in UserSpace.
music_desc: Play a selection of musical instruments using the keyboard like a lightweight GarageBand.
music_piano_desc: Play an acoustic piano using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_electric_piano_desc: Play an electric piano using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_organ_desc: Play an organ using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_acoustic_guitar_desc: Play an acoustic guitar using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_bass_guitar_desc: Play a bass guitar using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_violin_desc: Play a violin using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_cello_desc: Play a cello using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_flute_desc: Play a flute using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_clarinet_desc: Play a clarinet using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_trumpet_desc: Play a trumpet using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_saxophone_desc: Play a saxophone using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_harp_desc: Play a harp using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_vibraphone_desc: Play a vibraphone using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_bell_desc: Play bell tones using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_synth_lead_desc: Play a synth lead using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
music_harmonica_desc: Play a harmonica using a standard computer-keyboard piano layout with white and black keys.
todo_app_desc: Create, search, update, and complete todo items saved in todo.json.
todo_search_desc: Search todos by title or details.
todo_open_desc: Open a todo and read its details with speech.
todo_mark_complete_desc: Mark a todo item as completed.
todo_mark_pending_desc: Mark a completed todo item as pending.
db_table_create_desc: Create a new custom table with your own fields.
db_table_open_desc: Open a table and work with its records.
knowledge_desc: Short knowledge prompts powered by API League.
random_life_hack_desc: Fetch a practical random life hack from API League.
random_affirmation_desc: Fetch a positive random affirmation from API League.
random_trivia_desc: Fetch a random trivia fact from API League.
random_riddle_desc: Fetch a random riddle and its answer from API League.
random_quote_desc: Fetch a random quote and author from API League.
synonyms_desc: Look up synonyms for a word with API League.
singularize_desc: Convert a plural word to its singular form with API League.
random_poem_api_desc: Fetch a random poem from API League.
random_joke_api_desc: Fetch a random joke from API League.
riddles_desc: Choose a random riddle from the local riddles JSON file.
convert_units_desc: Convert one unit to another with API League.
trivia_desc: Play a configurable trivia quiz using Open Trivia DB.
trivia_start_desc: Start a trivia session using the saved trivia settings.
trivia_amount_desc: Choose how many trivia questions to fetch per session.
trivia_type_desc: Choose multiple choice or true/false questions.
trivia_encoding_desc: Choose the API response encoding format.
voice_recorder_desc: Record your voice using the system microphone and save it as a WAV file.
display_free_memory_desc: Show total, available, free, and used memory from the running system.
display_time_date_desc: Show the current local time, date, and time zone.
display_network_status_desc: Show the current Wi-Fi interface, connection state, and IP address.
display_power_status_desc: Show battery, external power, or Raspberry Pi voltage status when available.
voice_select_desc: Choose the default speech voice, similar to Bard's voice selection menu.
voice_kal_desc: Use the Kal voice as the default speech voice.
voice_slt_desc: Use the Slt voice as the default speech voice.
voice_rms_desc: Use the Rms voice as the default speech voice.
voice_awb_desc: Use the Awb voice as the default speech voice.
speech_speed_desc: Set the text-to-speech speed used by Flite.
speech_speed_very_slow_desc: Set speech to a very slow pace.
speech_speed_slow_desc: Set speech to a slow pace.
speech_speed_fast_desc: Set speech to a fast pace.
speech_speed_very_fast_desc: Set speech to a very fast pace.
download_voice_desc: Browse official Flite voice files and download or delete them locally.
audio_output_desc: Choose whether speech and other audio should use HDMI or the attached audio HAT.
audio_output_hdmi_desc: Route audio output through the HDMI device.
audio_output_hat_desc: Route audio output through the attached I2S or DAC audio HAT device.
set_volume_desc: Adjust the actual system output volume in 10 percent steps.
toggle_speech_mode_desc: Turn speech mode on or off.
audio_playback_desc: Speak the currently highlighted menu item while navigating.
audio_playback_on_desc: Enable spoken feedback for the highlighted menu item.
audio_playback_off_desc: Disable spoken feedback for the highlighted menu item.
braille_display_cells_desc: Set how many characters are shown in the braille footer display.
braille_display_cells_saved: Braille display width set to %d cells.
braille_display_size_desc: Choose the visual size of the braille footer display.
braille_character_spacing_desc: Set how many spaces appear between braille characters.
braille_character_spacing_saved: Braille character spacing set to %d spaces.
keys_manager_desc: Store and update secret API keys used by external services.
power_off_desc: Shut down the device by executing the system poweroff command.
wifi_scan_wait: Scanning for available networks. Please wait.
wifi_connect_wait: Connecting to the selected Wi-Fi network. Please wait.
volume_adjust_help: Use Up and Down arrows to change volume by 10 percent.
keys_manager_help: Press Enter to set or update the API League key. Press Esc to go back.
user_guide_desc: Read basic instructions for navigating and using Sai.
about_sai_desc: Learn what Sai is and what it is designed to do.
world_clock_error_loading: Unable to load time zone data.
world_clock_prompt: Choose a time zone to hear the current local time.
world_clock_fetch_failed: Failed to load world clock data.
